reviews.review_description:
Great hand tracking, passthrough game with 4 different games to play. I use the "flicking" technique with my fingers and that seems to work fairly well. It is so fun I can't even believe it. I was so pleasantly surprised! I played it while in my bed last night for quite a while and just had a blast! 

HIGHLY recommend ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
